title: AISC 360-22 Lifting Lug Design
description: Design steel lifting lugs in accordance with AISC 360-22.

W.description: Plate Width (W). Symbol: W. Units: mm. Plate width perpendicular to load.

H.description: Plate Height (H). Symbol: H. Units: mm. Plate height perpendicular to load.

dpin.description: Pin Diameter (dpin). Symbol: d_{pin}. Units: mm. Diameter of the pin inserted in the hole.

d_h.description: Hole Diameter (dh). Symbol: d_h. Units: mm. Hole diameter for the lug pin connection.

t_p.description: Plate Thickness (tp). Symbol: t_{p}. Units: mm. Thickness of the lug plate.

w_s.description: Weld Size (ws). Symbol: w_{s}. Units: mm. Minimum size per AISC 360-22 Table J2.4 depends on the thicker element.

theta.description: Load Angle (θ). Symbol: θ. Units: °. Maximum angle of load (in plane).

f_y.description: Yield Strength (Fy,plate). Symbol: F_{y}. Units: MPa. Yield strength of the lug plate.

f_u.description: Ultimate Strength (Fu,plate). Symbol: F_{u}. Units: MPa. Ultimate tensile strength of the lug plate.

f_u_pin.description: Ultimate Strength (Fu,pin). Symbol: F_{u,p}. Units: MPa. Ultimate tensile strength of the pin.

threads_intercepted.description: Threads in Shear Plane. Symbol: Threads. Check when the shear plane passes through the threaded portion of the pin per Table J3.2.

Fexx.description: Filler Metal Strength Classification (Fexx). Symbol: F_{exx}. Units: MPa. Strength classification of the weld filler metal.

P.description: Factored Axial Load (P). Symbol: P. Units: kN. Axial load applied to the lug, factored for design.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
